indications.text:
NUEDEXTA is indicated for the treatment of pseudobulbar affect (PBA).
PBA occurs secondary to a variety of otherwise unrelated neurologic conditions, and is characterized by
involuntary, sudden, and frequent episodes of laughing and/or crying. PBA episodes typically occur out
of proportion or incong...
